text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(The chocolate is sweet, the sponge is light—just as it should be.
Whipped for nine minutes, as required for these ingredients. I seem to
have got my sense for this back.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The sachertorte is complete, along with all the finishing touches. This
should be a worthy entry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few hours earlier...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The illustrious Spring Choice Chocolatier Contest is now accepting
entries!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
This event is part of the Chocolate Festival sponsored by Spring
Confectioners, who strive to produce "the peak of confection"!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Patissiers from all around the world gather to take part in this popular
chocolate exhibition! Expect to see a giant dessert buffet and live
baking performances!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
With contenders from schools all across the country, this contest aims
to find the best student confectioners! Entries are first come, first
served! As representative of our academy, I urge you to consider
applying!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Okay, entry application received. Contestants must enter in pairs, so
once you have a partner, we can complete your entry.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I've heard that you'll be taking over your family's bakery
once you graduate. Is that what motivated you to apply?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well, not exactly... Spring Confectioners is a client of ours, so I
wanted to enter as a way to express my gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As such, I do not take my entrance lightly. I intend to bring attention
to this year's contest in a way that will be remembered for years to
come. That's how determined I am.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I see! Hehe, that sounds like some great motivation.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Well then, please let me know if another applicant steps
forward—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Is this where I should submit my application for the Spring
Choice Chocolatier Contest?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now then, I'd like to begin our first strategy meeting for the Spring
Choice Chocolatier Contest. Here is the agenda.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
First, let's go over the rules. In this contest, each team prepares a
theme-based recipe in advance.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Then on the day of the contest, each team bakes their recipe. The
time limit is five hours. Entries are in pairs. During the preparation
period, each team is allowed to call on up to three helpers.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Next, I will explain the procedure for placing an order for uniforms.
The academy will provide uniforms for both participants.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Entrants must select a design from the catalog, input a size, and
submit the order to Tazuna within seven days.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. The uniforms will be a welcome addition. They're
incredibly suitable for efficient movement while baking.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Next, let's discuss the theme and how we shall proceed. This year, the
objective is to create a school-themed chocolate dessert.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's an abstract idea, which means there are many ways it could be
interpreted. In other words, brainstorming as many ideas as possible
will be crucial to our success.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I believe it would be most efficient to start by finding helpers,
gathering ideas, and testing them as we work on the design. What do
you think?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Calculating... The method suggested is the most efficient. I have no
objections.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well, then. After a three-minute break, let's check our training
schedules for openings and arrange future meetings.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: This isn't part of the meeting but... is baking a hobby of yours?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It differs slightly from a hobby.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
After five tries, my sponge cake is still 13% less bouncy than
anticipated. Status—failed. Improvement of skills is necessary.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Make friend chocolates for Valentine's!"
"Express your gratitude with fabulous chocolates!"

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Rice, Bakushin O, Flower... There are several people who I would like
to present them to.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Searching for a prompt and effective training method... The Spring
Choice Chocolatier Contest.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In summary, I entered in order to upgrade my skills. The desired
outcome: a level high enough to win in a competition.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, my objective is to win the highest award of excellence at
the Spring Choice Chocolatier Contest.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I see... That's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: A relief? Why?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The reason I applied is to repay a favor to Spring Confectioners. I'm
aiming for the first prize, and nothing less will do.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In team contests, success rides on sharing the same goal. So, I look
forward to working with you. Let's reach the "peak of confection"
together.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Affirmative!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Purple violas and pink pansies... hehe. I hope the girls will like how I
planted them together!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Are you okay, Flower?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine! The planter's just a bit too big, so I couldn't see my feet.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Why don't you let us carry it for you! You want it over there,
right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, it's okay—

text_block_list.name: Flower's Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
It's no problem. We'd rather do this than just let you fall down again!
You're still small, so don't worry about it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I was trying to do it on my own, but someone helped me out again...)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Flower—identity confirmed. Hello. I have a favor to ask.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Would you be willing to help me in the Spring Choice Chocolatier
Contest?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You want some help? Um... are you sure you want me, though?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Of course. Please lend me your cooking skills.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Well then, it's my pleasure to help you out! I'll give it everything I've
got. I'm glad to join your team!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Count me in too! Just leave everything to me!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Both have expressed their willingness and availability to assist us.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's great to hear. Thank you both for joining us. I have also invited
one more member to help us get a variety of ideas.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Heeey. If I help, I get to nosh on a bunch of sweets, right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well then, we look forward to working with all of you, even if it's only
for a short time.
